109\082\070\097\084","\087\070\056\122","\078\054\121\043\070\105\049\090\054\080\053\108\100\114\098\120\086\112\109\054\077\110\088\087\103\111\116\052\074\056\061\061","\051\048\090\080\049\051\065\057\088\052\112\109\050\117\085\073","\057\120\108\056\089\057\090\079\047\056\043\111\119\043\054\069\105\066\119\061","\102\087\054\043\056\122\061\061","\068\076\065\114\053\119\069\083","\107\052\073\117\104\074\061\061";"\115\049\084\087\079\079\101\087\072\107\084\103\121\077\119\084\074\075\067\079\083\098\075\098\079\080\088\114\114\122\061\061";"\052\081\080\099\116\089\117\088\097\073\098\098\122\056\061\061","\051\090\101\072\104\078\073\072\100\052\069\119\086\122\061\061";"\072\113\108\118\080\053\048\076\111\077\080\065","\072\084\122\074","\055\057\116\116\086\067\119\066\071\089\122\075\068\069\068\118\112\079\112\087\086\073\075\082\075\057\043\108\081\120\053\083\121\121\100\066\087\083\117\061";"\098\085\066\105\111\077\051\118\047\122\061\061","\084\043\050\085\114\112\077\117\107\057\114\049\051\056\061\061","\070\072\049\075\051\118\047\082","\075\070\051\105\070\116\051\071\112\084\079\100\102\108\075\067\106\069\051\055\108\056\079\073\049\052\121\080\049\071\061\061","\102\072\074\082\050\090\113\108\090\112\087\098\072\108\049\054\048\120\082\097\047\082\087\100\106\080\101\116\051\052\118\087\120\105\068\106\047\050\076\114\119\117\074\088\083\074\061\061";"\097\090\050\104\052\049\099\065";"\108\121\105\068\048\055\050\065";"\054\043\070\082\122\111\052\080\101\056\061\061";"\069\056\072\115","\069\101\048\082\067\098\082\087\117\117\071\061","\104\103\114\120\089\097\116\098\056\054\043\065","\081\090\075\102\066\082\080\047\087\116\057\085\088\068\071\061","\071\053\082\085\108\114\090\074","\090\105\116\099\087\097\056\061";"\043\113\074\086\122\077\084\075\114\103\078\074\053\088\053\051\087\079\048\048","\074\071\061\061","\050\080\104\089\056\122\050\075\119\072\065\114\053\056\061\061","\111\084\079\088\084\077\069\070";"\078\057\076\ return(function(u,g,C,j,B,w,D,m,F,x,T,q,O,U,I,y,P,i,k,d,s,R,Z,M,L)U,Z,R,k,F,y,M,m,P,x,i,d,s,O,L,T,q,I={},function(u,G)local g=m(G)local C=function(C)return x(u,{C},G,g)end return C end,function(u,G)local g=m(G)local C=function(...)return x(u,{...},G,g)end return C end,function(u,G)local g=m(G)local C=function(C,j,B,w,D,F)return x(u,{C,j,B,w,D;F},G,g)end return C
